attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
CASE WHEN ST.PRODUCT_FAMILY IS NULL THEN ST.CMRS_PRODUCT_FAMILY ELSE ST.PRODUCT_FAMILY  END AS BK_CMRS_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,
NDP.BK_PROMOTION_NUM AS BK_PROMOTION_NUM,
NDP. BK_PROMOTION_REVISION_NUM_INT  AS  BK_PROMOTION_REVISION_NUM_INT,
NDP. BK_PROMOTION_TYPE_CD  AS BK_PROMOTION_TYPE_CD,
ST.DETAIL_TYPE AS DETAIL_TYPE_CD,
CASE WHEN ST.DETAIL_TYPE='PRODUCT FAMILY' THEN 'Y'
ELSE 'N'
END  AS  INCLUDED_CMRS_PRDCT_FAMLY_ROLE,
ST.PROD_START_DATE AS RU_PRODUCT_START_DT,
ST.PROD_END_DATE AS RU_PRODUCT_END_DT,
ST.QUANTITY AS RU_DISCOUNT_QTY,
ST.DISCOUNT_PERCENT AS RU_DISCOUNT_PCT,
ST.CALCULATION_CRITERIA AS RU_CALCULATION_CRITERIA_NAME,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  AS   EDW_CREATE_DTM ,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER AS   EDW_UPDATE_USER
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_DCA_PROMO_PRODUCT_DETAILS  ST
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DISTRIBUTOR_PROMOTION NDP
ON NDP.SK_PROMO_ID_INT = ST.PROMO_ID
WHERE ST.DETAIL_TYPE IN ('PRODUCT FAMILY','EXCLUDE FAMILY') 
AND NOT EXISTS
( 
SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT_FAMILY NPF WHERE NPF.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID = ST.PRODUCT_FAMILY
)
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY BK_CMRS_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID ,
BK_PROMOTION_NUM ,BK_PROMOTION_REVISION_NUM_INT ,BK_PROMOTION_TYPE_CD  ORDER BY ST.LAST_UPDATE_DATE DESC) =1


UNION 

SELECT 
CASE WHEN EX.PRODUCT_FAMILY IS NULL THEN EX.CMRS_PRODUCT_FAMILY ELSE EX.PRODUCT_FAMILY  END AS BK_CMRS_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,
NDP.BK_PROMOTION_NUM AS BK_PROMOTION_NUM,
NDP. BK_PROMOTION_REVISION_NUM_INT  AS  BK_PROMOTION_REVISION_NUM_INT,
NDP. BK_PROMOTION_TYPE_CD  AS BK_PROMOTION_TYPE_CD,
EX.DETAIL_TYPE AS DETAIL_TYPE_CD,
CASE WHEN EX.DETAIL_TYPE='PRODUCT FAMILY' THEN 'Y'
ELSE 'N'
END  AS  INCLUDED_CMRS_PRDCT_FAMLY_ROLE,
EX.PROD_START_DATE AS RU_PRODUCT_START_DT,
EX.PROD_END_DATE AS RU_PRODUCT_END_DT,
EX.QUANTITY AS RU_DISCOUNT_QTY,
EX.DISCOUNT_PERCENT AS RU_DISCOUNT_PCT,
EX.CALCULATION_CRITERIA AS RU_CALCULATION_CRITERIA_NAME,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)  AS   EDW_CREATE_DTM ,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER AS   EDW_UPDATE_USER
FROM
$$EXCEPDB.EX_DIST_PRM_CMRS_PRDCT_FAMLY  EX
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DISTRIBUTOR_PROMOTION NDP
ON NDP.SK_PROMO_ID_INT = EX.PROMO_ID
WHERE EX.DETAIL_TYPE IN ('PRODUCT FAMILY','EXCLUDE FAMILY') 
AND NOT EXISTS
( 
SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT_FAMILY NPF WHERE NPF.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID = EX.PRODUCT_FAMILY
)
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY BK_CMRS_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID ,
BK_PROMOTION_NUM ,BK_PROMOTION_REVISION_NUM_INT ,BK_PROMOTION_TYPE_CD  ORDER BY EX.LAST_UPDATE_DATE DESC) =1

SELECT  ST.PROMO_ID, ST.PROMO_PROD_DETAIL_ID, ST.DETAIL_TYPE, ST.PART_NUMBER, ST.PRODUCT_FAMILY, ST.PRODUCT_CONFIG,  ST.DISCOUNT_TYPE, ST.QUANTITY, ST.DOLLAR_DISCOUNT_PER_UNIT, ST.MAX_DOLLAR_DISCOUNT, ST.ACTIVE_FLAG, ST.CREATED_BY, ST.CREATED_DATE,  ST.UPDATED_BY, ST.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, ST.OLD_PRICE, ST.NEW_PRICE, ST.REQUIRED_PRODUCT, ST.PROD_START_DATE, ST.PROD_END_DATE,  ST.CMRS_PRODUCT_FAMILY, ST.IT_COMMENTS, ST.MAX_ALLOWED_QUANTITY, ST.DISCOUNT_PERCENT, ST.CALCULATION_CRITERIA,  ST.PROMO_MAX_ALLOWED_QUANTITY, ST.PROMO_MAX_DOLLAR_DISCOUNT, ST.BATCH_ID, ST.ACTION_CD, ST.CREATE_DATETIME ,'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM $$STGDB.ST_DCA_PROMO_PRODUCT_DETAILS  ST
WHERE ST.DETAIL_TYPE IN ('PRODUCT FAMILY','EXCLUDE FAMILY') 
AND NOT EXISTS
( 
SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT_FAMILY NPF WHERE NPF.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID = ST.PRODUCT_FAMILY
)
AND NOT EXISTS
(
SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT_FAMILY NPF WHERE NPF.BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID = ST.PRODUCT_FAMILY )
